caption: In a dusty, open outdoor area with weathered buildings in the background, several individuals are dressed in camouflage military uniforms and tactical gear. They wear brown tactical vests and some have bright yellow armbands on their sleeves. In the beginning, one person is seen from behind walking away from the camera, while another is partially visible in the foreground. As the scene progresses, the focus shifts to a person standing with their back to the viewer, showing the detail of their camouflage jacket and a brown tactical vest equipped with pouches. A small red logo with the number "13" is visible in the upper right corner of the frames. The white text "Hero Ukraine" is overlaid on the scene. In the final frame, the lighting shifts dramatically to a dark, low-visibility environment where the silhouettes of equipment or vehicles are faintly visible.
